title: Elementary Kazakh
catalogDescription: Emphasizes on the four basic language skills: listening, speaking, reading, and writing in Kazakh. Focuses on exchanging real-life information in the context of the native-speaking environment and understanding Kazakh language through the cultural contexts. Third in a sequence of three. Cannot be taken if credit received for KAZAKH 105. Prerequisite: KAZAKH 102.

title: Intermediate Kazakh
catalogDescription: Designed to strengthen and develop further skills in listening, speaking, reading and writing and to deepen an understanding of the cultural context of Kazakh. Emphasis on the expansion and refinement of linguistic and communicative skills learned in elementary Kazakh. Prerequisite: either KAZAKH 103 or KAZAKH 105.
